programme.desc: Swift, matriarch of the Whiskers welcomes her latest litter while new leader Flint Lockwood struggles for childcare.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Mantis: The Queen of the Waterless River
programme.desc: This is the story of a Praying mantis which was born in the dry grasslands of Southern Italy.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The south of Africa is home to an unusual forest that loses its leaves during the dry season. The Mopane tree - or butterfly tree - is the main exponent of this behaviour.

programme.title: Wild Italy: From the Alps to Tuscany
programme.desc: In the episode “From the Alps to Tuscany”, the northern part of Italy is the focal point.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tag, You're It
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Training Day
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cutting the Apron Strings
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Short Handed
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Photo Op
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fight Like A Girl
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Higher Power
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission - convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Hero
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Parents' Day
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Father's Faith
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Heavy Date
programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Gateway to Hell: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, a deadly shark lurks on a golf course, and a giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Midnight Train to Hell: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Freak of the Deep: Deep-sea explorers discover a monster thousands of feet deep in the ocean, killer fog threatens a US town, and a truck spontaneously explodes on a freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Curse of the Mayan Treasure: An explorer at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by an underwater fog, thousands of fish jump to their deaths, and a UFO is spotted in LA skies.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Quarrels
programme.desc: Rita fears detection when Blake schedules an appointment for her with his doctor; Galen continues his scheming to regain the throne; Michael solely decides that he and Amanda will start a family.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Roadhouse
programme.desc: Joel tells Rita that she must sleep with Blake; Joel and the real Krystle are seen together at a roadhouse; Galen sends Michael to New York for help; Adam offers Bart Fallmont a bribe to insure the pipeline's success.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Solution
programme.desc: When Blake threatens divorce, Rita takes drastic action; Galen hides his recovery as he plots to regain the throne; Jonathan accepts a position with Bart Fallmont; Amanda receives a foreboding sign about Michael.

programme.title: Dynasty: Suspicions
programme.desc: Blake receives the fatal dose of poison; Sammy Jo discovers a suspicious vial; Krystle attempts two deceptive escapes; a fist-fight breaks out over the pipeline; Dex battles for construction rights; Alexis receives a call from a stranger.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Alarm
programme.desc: Galen plots his comeback; Alexis' long-lost sister appears; Joel and Rita plan their final move; Blake's life is in danger.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jamey and Ari
programme.desc: Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Blaire & Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Not Again
programme.desc: Teen Mom returns for another dramatic and emotional series as we follow the unpredictable lives of the four original teenagers. Expect trouble with the police, and battles in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Should I Stay or Should I Go?
programme.desc: Catelynn gets caught in a lie and faces losing her boyfriend Tyler. Amber's boyfriend Gary tells her he might leave her for another girl, and Maci tries to move into a shared house.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Maci goes clubbing with friends for Valentine's Day. A crying baby and unrealistic expectations ruin Amber and Gary's romantic night. Farrah shares a big secret about her baby's dad.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Spring Break
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's vacation shows there's no such thing as spring break once you have a baby. Maci butts heads with Ryan over his new girlfriend. Tyler is still angry with Catelynn.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Secrets & Lies
programme.desc: Gary dresses up as a bunny at Easter but a big fight makes Amber question their engagement. Maci's new boyfriend meets her son for the first time. Farrah falls victim to a scam.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Trial and Error
programme.desc: Maci wonders if her boyfriend Kyle's ready to date a teen mom. Catelynn's stepdad is court-ordered to go to rehab, leaving her with her mum who guilt trips her over the adoption.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The emergency bikers risk their own lives as they race to save and protect others. In Birmingham the biker paramedics are on the frontline as they deal with the aftermath of football violence.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin and the team welcome a Lincoln Continental with headlight woes and a VW Golf with reliability issues.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin Denton, a dedicated and skilled mechanic, opens his North London garage for classic car owners to get the help they need to keep their precious cars on the road.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: A 289 AC Cobra comes into the garage with an intermittent indicator issue, but the team scratch their heads about the provenance of the car.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: The garage sees a Nissan Figaro with sticking seatbelts which Colin has an unexpected remedy for.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: The Afro Classics Club uses their dedicated tinker day to prepare their vehicles for the club's debut outing at the Bicester Scramble event in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A woman plunges 10 feet through the floorboards of her Sheffield home in a freak accident, and the HART team launch a major rescue operation to save her.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A hitman with links to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The team are called to a major fire in a chemicals factory, and paramedics join forces with the firefighters desperately searching for teenagers reported missing in a swollen river.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'm 27…Is My Teen Boyfriend Cheating?
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.desc: Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered five kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number six because she claims he’s the father of her baby!

programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Bobby wants to peacefully co-parent with his ex-wife, Andrea, but says she's a liar, & a sex-addict who exposes their son, Kayden, 6, to her lifestyle. He says her bedroom a revolving door of men. Andrea says Bobby is obsessed with ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: It’s one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.
